mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adoption_application (user_id, pet_id, living_type, housing_type, has_yard, experience, current_pets, daily_time, reason, contact_address, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{petId}, #{livingType}, #{housingType}, #{hasYard}, #{experience}, #{currentPets}, #{dailyTime}, #{reason}, #{contactAddress}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE adoption_application SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM adoption_application WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND pet_id = #{petId} AND status IN (0, 1, 2)
